intent: Fix false clean auto-review status for Gemini inline badge comments and clear PR #24 Medium/High review items.
assumptions: Gemini inline comments appear under headings like ### file:line with severity image badges.
Medium, Medium+, High, and Critical badge comments are actionable by auto-fix policy.
Frontend review cleanup should preserve existing drag-move behavior.
risks: Inline badge comments parsed as zero issues can publish a false clean-loop message.
Mobile elementFromPoint can hit the dragged card without pointer-events-none.
Breadcrumb drops can bypass selected-batch expansion.
verification: npm test -- FileCardMobileDragMove.test.tsx FolderCardDragMove.test.tsx FileListBatchDragMove.test.tsx useFileActionsDragMove.test.tsx
